elements.label: Description
elements.defaultValueFormula:
CASE(equipment.value,
  "Bed", "electric, med surg",
  "Table", "Overbed",
  "Monitor", "Vital Signs",
   "Television", "55-in",
   "Headwall", "dual rail",
    "Boom", "dual pendant",
    "Cabinet", "bedside",
    "Chair", "high back"
)
